parameters.query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS agent_id,
  a.name AS agent_name,
  a.email AS agent_email,
  a.phone AS agent_phone,
  a.target_conversions_monthly,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) AS total_leads,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status = 'converted' THEN l.id END) AS converted_leads,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status = 'qualified' THEN l.id END) AS qualified_leads,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status = 'lost' THEN l.id END) AS lost_leads,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN l.id END) AS new_leads_this_week,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.last_contact_at < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 days' 
    AND l.status NOT IN ('converted', 'lost') THEN l.id END) AS overdue_followups,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) > 0 
    THEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status = 'converted' THEN l.id END)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) * 100 
    ELSE 0 END, 1
  ) AS conversion_rate_pct,
  AVG(CASE WHEN l.status = 'converted' THEN 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (l.converted_at - l.created_at)) / 86400 END
  ) AS avg_days_to_convert
FROM agents a
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.agent_id = a.id AND l.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
WHERE a.active = true
GROUP BY a.id, a.name, a.email, a.phone, a.target_conversions_monthly
ORDER BY conversion_rate_pct DESC;

parameters.subject: Action Required: Agent {{ $json.agent_name }} needs attention
parameters.message:
=

Agent Performance Alert

The following agent requires management attention:

Agent{{ $json.agent_name }}
Email{{ $json.agent_email }}
Conversion Rate{{ $json.conversion_rate_pct }}%
Total Leads{{ $json.total_leads }}
Converted{{ $json.converted_leads }}
Overdue Follow-ups{{ $json.overdue_followups }}
New Leads This Week{{ $json.new_leads_this_week }}

Please schedule a check-in with this agent to discuss their pipeline.
